about.title: About me
about.body: Full Stack Developer (Systems Engineer) with 3+ years building scalable, user-focused web applications. I aim for measurable outcomes, strong performance and maintainable code, working across frontend, backend and data. I’ve contributed in contexts like business management, gamification and education; I adapt quickly to new environments and enjoy taking on challenges with discipline and ownership.

neardental.title: NEARDENTAL - Admin panel
neardental.description: Administrative panel with robust workflows and real-time operational visibility.
neardental.longDescription:
Administrative panel built with Angular + Node.js + MySQL and deployed on AWS.

Highlights:
- Admin dashboards and operational views
- Secure API design
- Scalable architecture ready for growth

brainbike.title: Gopapaya - Gamified platform
brainbike.description: Gamified experience with predictable state management and performance-first UI.
brainbike.longDescription:
Gamified platform built with Angular (NgRx/RxJS) and Node.js.

Highlights:
- Strong state architecture with NgRx
- Modular UI components
- Backend services for gameplay and progress

upc.title: Universidad Popular del Cesar - Academic system
upc.description: Academic workflows system focused on maintainability and containerized deployment.
upc.longDescription:
Academic system built with Angular and Docker-based environments.

Highlights:
- Containerized setup with Docker
- Clean module boundaries
- Stable delivery pipelines

neardental-fleet.1: Indicators dashboard: charts of trips by vehicle type and key metrics to support decisions.
neardental-fleet.2: Role-based login: controlled access depending on user permissions.
neardental-fleet.3: Role-specific manual: guidance to speed up adoption and reduce operational errors.
neardental-fleet.4: Fleet availability: historical vehicle status tracking by company/station for better control.
neardental-fleet.5: Team operativity: productivity visualizations to spot improvement opportunities.
neardental-fleet.6: Trip KPIs: impact indicators with calculation explanations and clean visual distribution.

brain-bike.1: Login screen: secure entry and session control.
brain-bike.2: Session calendar: scheduling over time to improve continuity.
brain-bike.3: Live game: a real-time view that showcases engagement and usage.
brain-bike.4: Main dashboard: quick access to the most used modules.
brain-bike.5: Games catalog: variety of game types to keep motivation high.
brain-bike.6: User manual: support to reduce friction and explain features clearly.

upc-academic.1: Login: centralized access for academic users.
upc-academic.2: Reports: parameter-based queries for monitoring and decisions.
upc-academic.3: Modal example: course creation with guided, consistent flows.
upc-academic.4: User management: grant/revoke permissions and manage access.
upc-academic.5: Grades tracking: record/view/edit with clear evaluation criteria.
upc-academic.6: File upload: download template and upload Excel using a defined format.
